testcase.name: test_j01_admin_bootstrap

error.message: failed on setup with "AssertionError: callback did not return an oauth_session fragment"

testcase.error:
self = <Coroutine test_j01_admin_bootstrap>
def setup(self) -> None: runner_fixture_id = f"_{self._loop_scope}_scoped_runner" if runner_fixture_id not in self.fixturenames: self.fixturenames.append(runner_fixture_id) > return super().setup() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
.venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:458: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ .venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:743: in pytest_fixture_setup hook_result = yield ^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:361: in _async_fixture_wrapper result = runner.run(setup(), context=context) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ../../../../.pyenv/versions/3.13.1/lib/python3.13/asyncio/runners.py:118: in run return self._loop.run_until_complete(task) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ../../../../.pyenv/versions/3.13.1/lib/python3.13/asyncio/base_events.py:720: in run_until_complete return future.result() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/pytest_asyncio/plugin.py:357: in setup res = await fixture_function(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ journeys/conftest.py:574: in admin_client provisioned = await oauth_login( journeys/helpers/oauth.py:66: in oauth_login payload = _decode_oauth_session_payload(redirect_location) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
redirect_location = '/login?error=oauth_link_conflict'
def _decode_oauth_session_payload(redirect_location: str) -> dict[str, object]: fragment = redirect_location.split("#oauth_session=", 1) if len(fragment) != 2: > raise AssertionError("callback did not return an oauth_session fragment") E AssertionError: callback did not return an oauth_session fragment
journeys/helpers/oauth.py:36: AssertionError
